exampleSentences: Sau một ngày làm việc mệt mỏi, thân xác anh cảm thấy rất rã rời.
Thiền giúp em thư giãn cả tâm trí và thân xác.
Chị nên chăm sóc thân xác để luôn có sức khỏe tốt.
notes:
Thân xác means the physical body, especially as separate from the mind or soul. It often feels a bit serious or philosophical.

It’s an uncountable noun and usually refers to the whole body, not a body part. Very common pairing: tâm hồn và thân xác (soul and body).  

Close synonyms: cơ thể (more neutral, everyday) and thân thể (slightly formal).  

Use thân xác when you want to stress the physical side of a person, especially in contrast with feelings or spirit.
notes_md:
**Thân xác** means the physical body, especially as separate from the mind or soul. It often feels a bit serious or philosophical.

It’s an uncountable noun and usually refers to the whole body, not a body part. Very common pairing: *tâm hồn và thân xác* (soul and body).  

Close synonyms: **cơ thể** (more neutral, everyday) and **thân thể** (slightly formal).  

Use **thân xác** when you want to stress the physical side of a person, especially in contrast with feelings or spirit.
exampleSentencesTranslated: After a tiring day at work, his body feels very exhausted.
Meditation helps me relax both my mind and body.
You should take care of your body to always have good health.
